arts.ttl: Italy to honour Gigi Riva with special pre-match tribute against France
arts.sum: The Italian national team is set to pay a heartfelt tribute to the legendary Gigi Riva before their Nations League match against France at San Siro. Riva, who passed away in January, would have celebrated his 80th birthday on November 7th. Sky Sport Italia report that the Italian Football Federation (FIGC) has planned a special commemoration for the man known as ‘Rombo di Tuono’ (Rumble of Thunder). As part of the pre-match festivities, a video showcasing some of Riva’s most memorable goals will be displayed on San Siro’s giant screens.
